name: mark_section_complete
description: Ask CitizenFlow to mark a section complete only after all required supported fields in that section have been collected confidently.

section.description: The section to complete. One of INTRO, PERSONAL_INFO, RESIDENCE_HISTORY, FAMILY_INFO, EMPLOYMENT, TRAVEL, MORAL_CHARACTER, OATH, or REVIEW.

summary.description: A one-sentence summary of what was collected in this section.
